description_long: This is a white athletic running shoe with mesh and synthetic overlays, featuring a prominent black and gray side logo and accents. The upper is constructed from breathable mesh with reinforced synthetic panels for durability and support, while the toe area is rounded and slightly reinforced. The midsole appears cushioned, designed for shock absorption, and the outsole is made of durable rubber with visible tread for traction. The shoe has a standard criss-cross lacing system with white laces threaded through reinforced eyelets. The heel counter is slightly raised and padded, providing additional ankle support, and the interior is lined with soft fabric for comfort. Subtle branding is visible on the heel and side, and the overall condition shows signs of light use with minor discoloration.
description: A white athletic running shoe with black and gray accents, mesh upper, and standard lacing, showing light signs of use. Features a cushioned sole and visible branding on the side and heel.
description_view_0: Front view shows the rounded toe, mesh upper, and criss-cross lacing with reinforced eyelets.
description_view_1: Left side view highlights the black and gray side logo, mesh panels, and cushioned midsole.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the padded heel counter, subtle branding, and slight wear on the heel.
description_view_3: Right side view mirrors the left, showing the logo, mesh construction, and overall shoe profile.
attribute_logo: Reebok logo on the side in black and on the heel in gray
